question: Find the number of visitors who did not visit any museum opened after 2010.
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM visitor WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT t2.visitor_id FROM museum AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID WHERE t1.open_year  >  2010)
predicted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM visitor WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT T1.col_2 FROM visit AS T1 JOIN museum AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_4 > 2010)
raw_response: SELECT count(*) FROM visitor WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT T1.col_2 FROM visit AS T1 JOIN museum AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_4 > 2010)
